title: oxera sessilifolia
intro: Oxera sessilifolia, also known as the New Caledonian oxeye or the New Caledonian mountain bush, is a flowering plant species in the mint family Lamiaceae. Traditionally, this plant is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Oxera sessilifolia include potential uses as a treatment for digestive issues, fever reduction, and pain relief. Herbal preparations of Oxera sessilifolia are often made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and may be used in combination with other herbs to enhance their effects.
